backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing feature IDs, titles, related files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries for multiple frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining OKLCH-based light/dark theme tokens and paper/print styling.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML file mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full TanStack Router setup with all app routes wrapped in AppShell and MockStoreProvider.
frontend/src/components/ai/FloatingAIBut: Floating circular AI button that navigates to the /ai page and exposes a coachmark target.
frontend/src/components/editor/AddQuesti: Dialog for adding a new question heading with title and planned question count.
frontend/src/components/editor/AutoGrowT: Auto‑resizing textarea component that grows with content up to a max row limit.
frontend/src/components/editor/FloatingR: Draggable floating toolbox for desktop that lets users select sections/headings and add questions to a paper.
frontend/src/components/editor/MobileRea: Mobile version of the floating toolbox with a draggable FAB and expandable panel for selecting sections/headings and adding questions.
frontend/src/components/editor/RealPaper: Sidebar toolbox for selecting a section and adding question types to a real paper layout.
Coachmark spotlight that highlights the toolbox and guides users with an overlay and callout message.
frontend/src/components/editor/RichCellE: Rich text and image editor for table cells supporting pasting, uploading, resizing, and deleting images.
frontend/src/components/errors/AppErrorB: React error boundary that displays an error card with reload and home navigation options when failures occur.
Top-level layout handling theme init, auth/onboarding redirects, and showing loading or storage error states.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Navig: Sidebar menu enabling navigation, paper creation, and logout with active-state styling.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Coach: Guided onboarding overlay that positions callouts near target elements with retries and a fallback UI.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperActio: Overflow menu for paper actions including print, export, share, and delete with dialogs.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperRende: Renders question content and rich cell media for different question types in printable form.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperSurfa: Renders a full paper layout with editable question blocks, auto‑focus behavior, and navigation for adding questions. Handles selection, section insertion context, and displays header and sections.
frontend/src/components/paper/QuestionBl: Provides an editor UI for a single question, supporting MCQ and fill‑in‑the‑blank types with update and delete handlers. Manages auto‑focus and input change propagation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, recreating it when identity changes. Invalidates and refetches dependent queries on actor updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoachmarks.ts: Manages multi‑step onboarding coachmarks, tracking active step, navigation changes, and completion. Starts tutorial based on a localStorage flag and provides step controls.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedEffect.ts: Runs a debounced effect callback after a delay, clearing timers on dependency changes. Useful for throttling frequent updates like autosave.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableFloatingP: Enables draggable floating UI panels with optional viewport constraints and persisted position. Handles mouse/touch drag events and localStorage syncing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity context, handling authentication, identity loading, and login/logout state via AuthClient. Exposes identity status flags and control functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealPaperToolboxSp: Tracks whether a toolbox spotlight has been completed using localStorage. Exposes flags and functions to complete or reset spotlight state.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: React hook managing light/dark/system theme with localStorage and system preference listeners.
frontend/src/hooks/useUndoRedo.ts: Custom hook providing undo/redo history with configurable limits and external state change callbacks.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining light and dark theme color variables, sidebar styles, and global CSS tokens.
frontend/src/lib/ai/mockQuestionGenerato: Deterministic mock generator producing template‑based numerical or conceptual questions using cleaned topic text.
Utilities for rich table cell content including text, inline images, size conversions, image extraction, and normalization.
frontend/src/lib/editor/sectionInsertCon: LocalStorage helpers to store, load, and clear context describing where new questions should be inserted.
Converts a paper object into a formatted text export and triggers file download.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/extractedTextQuesti: Parses OCR text to detect numbered, bullet, and question‑word‑based questions with confidence and style assessment.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor.ts: Generates OCR question sessions from extracted text using multiple strategies and stores them in safe storage.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrQuestionGenerato: Cleans text lines and generates questions by extracting key terms, phrases, and validated lines.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/ocrSpaceClient.ts: Client for calling OCR.space API to extract text from supported image/PDF files with size and error handling.
frontend/src/lib/papers/createNewPaper.t: Builds a new Paper object with default fields based on the user profile.
frontend/src/lib/storage/questionDraftSt: Saves, loads, and clears per-paper question drafts using safe storage.
frontend/src/lib/storage/safeStorage.ts: Provides safe wrappers around localStorage with availability checks and error handling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query client and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/ai/AIPreferencesWiref: UI for generating, editing, selecting, and inserting AI-generated practice questions.
frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginWireframe.t: Login screen supporting Internet Identity and guest login with redirect logic.
Loads and displays saved drafts from localStorage with error handling for storage availability and navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/editor/PaperEditorWir: Provides a paper editor with undo/redo, autosave, and section management using mock store data.
frontend/src/pages/editor/QuestionEntryW: Handles creating questions with autosaving drafts, undo/redo, and saving to personal bank or paper.
frontend/src/pages/editor/RealPaperEdito: Full paper editor enabling section, heading, and question editing with autosave, toolbox controls, and undo/redo.
frontend/src/pages/export/ExportPrintPre: Shows export and print preview of a paper with layout modes, sharing, text download, and print actions.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomeDashboardWir: Dashboard showing welcome info, quick actions, and recent papers with navigation and paper creation.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRReviewApproveW: Displays OCR‑extracted questions for review, selection, approval, or rejection, then saves approved items to the personal bank.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRUploadWirefram: Handles OCR file upload, extraction, error states, and redirects to the review page after generating questions.
frontend/src/pages/onboarding/Onboarding: Onboarding screen letting users start or skip an interactive tutorial before entering the app.
frontend/src/pages/papers/GeneratedPaper: Lists generated papers with options to edit, export, or delete, showing a table or empty state.
frontend/src/pages/profile/ProfileWirefr: Profile form for editing teacher details and defaults used when creating new papers.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/Question: UI for browsing starter and personal questions, with logic to insert a selected question into a specific paper section and navigate back to the editor.
frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsWire: Settings page providing theme selection, tutorial reset, and data‑clear actions using mock store and local storage.
frontend/src/state/mockData.ts: Defines data models for profile, questions, papers, sections, and provides default profile, starter questions, and sample papers.
frontend/src/state/mockStore.tsx: Implements a React context store handling auth state, profile, papers, personal questions, persistence to localStorage, and normalization of rich question content.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme colors, typography, animations, and component styling extensions.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing current requirements, issues, and features related to the question editor and UI theme updates.
